overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire walking along a coastal dirt path toward the Lighthouse of Alexandria on a bright sunny day. The scene features Mediterranean vegetation, ancient stone architecture, and an NPC briefly running past the player character near the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal dirt path approaching ancient lighthouse

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal dirt path toward the lighthouse with the sea visible to the left

entered.detail: tall ancient stone lighthouse with a burning flame at the top, dominating the horizon
cluster of palm trees lining the left side of the path
elevated rocky ground and stone walls on the right side of the path
blue sea meeting the sky on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide coastal dirt path under a clear blue sky, approaching the massive Lighthouse of Alexandria in the distance. Palm trees line the left side while rocky terrain rises on the right, with the Mediterranean Sea visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: lighthouse entrance courtyard with sphinx statues

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk toward the lighthouse base, approaching the stone stairs and sphinx statues

notable_agents.action: running past the player character from left to right, heading away from the lighthouse

entered.detail: stone sphinx statue flanking the left side of the entrance path
stone sphinx statue flanking the right side of the entrance path
stone staircase leading up to the lighthouse entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the base of the lighthouse where two large sphinx statues guard the entrance stairs. An NPC runs past from the left, and the palm trees now loom closer as the open coastal view gives way to the enclosed lighthouse courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bright coastal path that gradually transitions from an open seaside vista to the enclosed entrance of a monumental structure. It begins with the character walking down a wide dirt path under a clear blue sky, with palm trees to the left and rocky terrain to the right as the Mediterranean Sea stretches across the horizon. As the character advances, the distant silhouette of the Lighthouse of Alexandria grows larger, dominating the view. The scene then shifts from the expansive coastline into the lighthouse courtyard, where the open horizon is replaced by towering palms and the massive forms of two sphinx statues guarding the entrance stairs. Finally, the camera captures an NPC running past from the left just as the character reaches the base of the monument.
